content:
The class may vote to challenge or accept it.


📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents stagnant gameplay—a power shake-up keeps the game dynamic.
✔ Adds a layer of controlled randomness—everyone must prepare for surprises.
✔ Ties into classic narrative disruptions (e.g., the arrival of a new challenger, the gods intervening, or an unexpected betrayal).

📜 3. Expanded Literary Items – More Weapons, Armor, and Artifacts

📜 Every week, a new set of legendary literary items will be up for grabs.

✔ Item distribution follows a structured method:
• 1 Weapon (Swords, Staves, Relics of Power)
